|                     |
|    +-----------+    |
|    |  Execute  |    |
|    +-----------+    |
|          ^          |
|          |          |
|     +----+----+     |
|     |  Parse  |     |
|     +---------+     |
|          ^          |
|          |          |
|          +-----+++  |
+[  Processing  ]ooo--+
            ++---+++
+-----------oo---------+
|           |          |
|           |          |
|    +------+-----+    |
|    |  Validate  |    |
|    +------------+    |
|           ^          |
|           |          |
|      +----+----+     |
|      |  Login  |     |
|      +---------+     |
|                      |
|                      |
+[  Authentication  ]--+
